event.description: Setting the `autoescape` attribute to `false` disables the escaping mechanism of the Swig template engine. This may lead to XSS attack if untrusted data is not properly validated and escaped.
Set the `autoescape` attribute to `true`, or omit it as the default value is `true`.

typePropertiesGroup.longDescription: Setting the `autoescape` attribute to `false` disables the escaping mechanism of the Swig template engine. This may lead to XSS attack if untrusted data is not properly validated and escaped.
